issue_title: fix: precached files are not updated
issue_body_preview:
I stumbled upon an issue - my main page was not updating. (route `/`).
After lot of digging I found, that it's precached inside service worker and is not updated, even when updated service worker is uploaded.

Some more about this issue with my comment here:
https://github.com/nuxt-community/pwa
test_description_zh: 部署新版本内容后，访问主页（路由 /），等待 Service Worker 更新完成（可刷新页面或等待自动更新），观察页面内容是否反映最新版本的变更。
expected_result_zh: 当新版本的 Service Worker 激活后，预缓存的页面内容应正确更新为最新版本，主页显示的内容应与最新部署的版本一致，而非停留在旧的缓存内容。
